title: ODBC Driver does not correctly report ::SQLForeignKeys update or delete rule
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST_TABLE3 (COL1 INT NOT NULL, COL2 VARCHAR(50), COL3 DATE, TABLE3_CD VARCHAR(8) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (TABLE3_CD));
INSERT INTO TEST_TABLE3 (COL1, COL2, COL3, TABLE3_CD) VALUES (1, 'Test', '2023-10-01', 'T3CD1');
UPDATE TEST_TABLE3 SET COL2 = NULL WHERE TABLE3_CD = 'T3CD1';
SELECT * FROM TEST_TABLE3 WHERE COL1 IN (SELECT COL1 FROM TEST_TABLE3 WHERE COL2 IS NULL);
key_bug_features: ODBC Driver fails to report foreign key delete rules
